headline: Double Your Retirement Income in a Decade. Here’s How.
summary: A retiree who starts with a 10% dividend yield can collect far more income on day one than someone earning 3.5%. Twenty years later, the tables may have turned. One income stream stayed flat while inflation chipped away at its buying power. The other kept growing year after year until it was paying dramatically more. ... Double Your Retirement Income in a Decade. Here’s How.

headline: WEN Stock Up 28% in a Month: Should Investors Chase the Rally or Wait?
summary: Wendy's 28% gain in a month is fueled by retail-trader buzz, Project Fresh optimism and valuation appeal, but weak U.S. sales and cost inflation loom.

headline: 7-Eleven enters chicken sandwich war
summary: 7-Eleven is stepping into perhaps one of fast food’s toughest fights in recent memory. The chain built its U.S. food identity around Slurpees, Big Bite hot dogs, and roller-grill stops. However, of late, it’s tried to become more of a real meal destination, using hotter, heavier handhelds to ...
